mano_cua.result_summary: 应用崩溃无法渲染。ReactGrid 存在循环依赖导致 TDZ ReferenceError（Cannot access 'ReactGrid' before initialization at PartialArea.tsx:11），React 根元素为空，webpack-dev-server 错误覆盖层覆盖整个页面。刷新和强制刷新均无效。这是一个模块初始化顺序错误的功能性 Bug。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Application crashes with ReferenceError: Cannot access 'ReactGrid' before initialization. Circular dependency: core/index.ts -> ReactGrid -> PartialArea.tsx -> ReactGrid causes TDZ error. React root div#root is empty. All recovery attempts failed.
